response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, and his work at Sociomantic on high-throughput microservices (millions of HTTP req/s) demonstrates real production scale. However, the role is highly specialized around growth engineering, experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry foundations, and feature flagging — none of which appear meaningfully in his history. His current seniority is at the Staff/Senior level, and there is no evidence of the IC6-scope cross-team technical leadership, metrics-driven growth work, or experimentation framework ownership that define this Principal role.
strengths: Proven experience with high-throughput distributed systems at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second using low-latency, async I/O architectures
Broad multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, D, Node.js) and demonstrated comfort picking the right tool per domain
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, aligning with the AI-first engineering theme
concerns: No demonstrable experience with experimentation platforms, A/B test frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout-risk management — the core technical competency of this role
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership, statistical analysis pipelines, or growth measurement systems at any employer

Resume reflects Senior/Staff individual contributor work rather than Principal-level cross-team technical leadership, architectural ownership across multiple workstreams, or influence beyond immediate team boundaries

key_factors.factor: Level gap: Senior vs Principal IC6
